title: Political Life and Public Pedagogy in the Higher Music Education: Focus Group Interviews in Nordic Countries 2024
description: The study consists of interviews with personnel from Nordic higher music institutions. The interviews explore perceptions of public pedagogy, societal engagement, and the relationship between politics and higher music education. The interviews began by asking participants what public pedagogy means to them and whether they have engaged in activities that, in their view, could be interpreted as public pedagogy in their teaching or artistic work.
